cmd_quit_guard:
Already quitting, adventurer? Coward.
 [1] Yes, I give up
 [2] No! I can do this!
cmd_help:
Commands:
  go [north|south|east|west]   Move
  n / s / e / w                Shortcut directions
  look  (l)                    Describe current room
  inventory  (i)               Show items
  status                       Show character sheet
  help  (?)                    Show this help
  quit  (q)                    Exit
status_level_up: вљЎ LEVEL UP! Now level %d! (HP: %d, ATK: %d)
status_sheet:
=== CHARACTER SHEET ===
Name   : %s
Class  : %s
Level  : %d (XP: %d/%d)
HP     : %d / %d
Attack : %d
Gold   : %d
=======================
game_over: You have fallen in the dungeon. GAME OVER.
game_win: YOU WIN! Final score: Level %d | Gold %d
combat_potion_used: You drink a potion and recover 30 HP! (HP: %d/%d)
shop_no_items_to_sell: You don't have any items to sell!
room_entrance_desc:
You stand at the threshold of darkness.
 A rusted iron gate hangs ajar, its hinges weeping with age.
 Cold air seeps from the corridor ahead, carrying the faint stench of rot and old blood.
 Whatever lies within... it is waiting.
room_corridor_desc:
Torches long extinguished line the walls, their sconces caked with black soot.
 Your footsteps echo unnervingly вЂ” yet something else echoes back, just a half-beat too late.
 The shadows here are not empty.
room_armory_desc:
Weapon racks lie toppled and ransacked, their blades long since claimed by rust or fleeing soldiers.
 A tattered banner bearing a forgotten crest sags from the ceiling.
 Someone left in a great hurry вЂ” and did not return.
room_crypt_desc:
Stone sarcophagi line the walls like sleeping sentinels, their carved faces worn to featureless ovals by centuries of damp.
 Latin inscriptions warn of things best left undisturbed.
 One lid has been pushed aside вЂ” from the inside.
room_altar_desc:
A black stone altar dominates the chamber, still stained with sacrifices older than memory.
 Candles of dark wax burn without flame, casting a cold violet light.
 The air itself feels wrong here вЂ” thick, watchful, hungry.
room_boss_chamber_desc:
The ceiling disappears into darkness above a cathedral of bones.
 Treasure glints beneath centuries of ash.
 Then вЂ” a sound like a furnace door opening вЂ” and two amber eyes, each the size of a shield, slide open in the dark.
room_shop_desc:
Wedged improbably between crumbling dungeon walls is a cluttered merchant stall, lit by a cheerful lantern.
 A stout dwarf with a braided beard eyes you from behind a counter of peculiar wares.
 'Coin talks, adventurer. Everything else walks.'
room_spider_corridor_desc:
The corridor narrows into a suffocating throat of stone.
Thick webs hang from the ceiling like veils, clinging to armor and skin.
With every step, something brittle snaps underfoot: old exoskeletons and hollow shells.
Somewhere in the dark, countless tiny legs skitter in unison.
room_spider_den_desc:
This chamber is choked with layers of webbing, stretched like funeral drapes between floor and ceiling.
Pale cocoons dangle from the arches, a few still trembling almost imperceptibly.
The floor is a carpet of dried carcasses, bleached bones, and shattered carapaces.
Then, somewhere above you, comes a faint tear in the silk вЂ” followed by the growing tick of innumerable legs in motion.
room_fungal_cavern_desc:
The dungeon stone breaks into a clammy, suffocating cavern where giant ash-colored mushrooms thrust from the ground like twisted pillars.
A haze of bioluminescent spores drifts through the air, washing everything in sickly greens and unnatural violets.
Narrow paths and moss-slick stone bridges link slick terraces where patches of mold throb faintly.
Each breath pricks at your throat: a mild but persistent poison seeping into your lungs.
room_already_visited: You have already passed through here.
room_corridor_cleared_desc:
The creature's body lies still now, slumped against the soot-blackened wall.
The echo that once hung in the corridor has faded into silence.
room_armory_cleared_desc:
The fallen creature lies among shattered racks, its blood mingling with rust.
The forgotten crest upon the banner still seems to watch from the dark.
room_crypt_cleared_desc:
The creature lies motionless beside an open sarcophagus.
The displaced lid feels almost like a prophecy fulfilled.
room_altar_cleared_desc:
The creature's blood darkens the altar, merging with stains from older rites.
The cold violet light still burns, indifferent to all.
room_spider_den_cleared_desc:
The swollen body of the Spider Lord lies on the ground, drowned in a pool of green blood.
The webs overhead hang motionless now вЂ” their master has fallen.
room_fungal_cavern_cleared_desc:
The creature's corpse is already half-buried beneath a pallid veil of mycelium.
Spores drift through the air, unaware of its stillness.
room_boss_chamber_cleared_desc:
The Ancient Dragon has been slain. Its colossal body lies coiled among the treasure, cold and still.
Even the gold seems to hold its breath.

GAME OVER
